content.text: Implement timeline resize handle parity phase 2 — persistence + viewer min-height + tolerance.
Will implement persistence layer for resize state, add min-height clamp on viewer, and tolerance band per Hz parity.

Implementation done. PR #10351 opened: feat(squirrel): timeline resize handle parity phase 2 — persistence + viewer min-height + tolerance (FFP-88023). CI all green. Awaiting human review — this is a feature PR, not test/refactor.
